author: Khoa Phan
name: Recursive Transformer 4B/7L + VE + QAT Int6 + Score-First TTT
blurb: Novel recursive/looped transformer: 4 shared blocks applied 7 times in a U-Net encoder-decoder pattern with skip connections. ValueEmbedding reinjects token identity into attention. Int6 QAT from step 0 via STE. Score-first TTT+sliding window eval. 30M params at dim=1024 vs standard 512.
